description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a rugged appearance, featuring a sleeveless vest that reveals well-defined arms adorned with tattoos. He wears fitted pants and fingerless gloves, adding to a tough, streetwise look. His stance is broad-shouldered and confident, with visible veins and muscle definition on his arms. The figure has a full beard and short, styled hair, giving him a distinctive, assertive presence. He is equipped with wristbands and sturdy shoes, suitable for urban environments. The overall impression is of a strong, athletic individual ready for action in a city setting.
description: A muscular adult male with a sleeveless vest, tattoos, gloves, and fitted pants, exuding a tough, urban style. He stands confidently with a full beard and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, sleeveless vest, gloves, and confident facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm tattoos, muscular build, and profile of the face and gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, fitted pants, and the broad shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the arm's muscle definition, wristband, and side profile of the head and gloves.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless vest, fitted pants, fingerless gloves, wristbands
